commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Maintainers must choose the permanent config/API boundary, and the contributor must supply successful current-head real-environment proof before merge.; Cleared: The patch changes source, tests, config schema, and docs without adding dependencies, workflows, permissions, secret handling, downloads, lifecycle scripts, or package-resolution behavior. (sha=8424fb48eb04f8b7b8b1a0964a6eda4634115801)
commands.review_summary:
Adds an opt-in `directory` tool-search mode that presents a bounded catalog and hydrates authorized deferred tools through new agent-core and session hooks.

PR surface: Source +669, Tests +809, Docs +37. Total +1515 across 23 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a new directory mode, and current main has no established directory-mode behavior to reproduce as broken.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers must choose the permanent config/API boundary, and the contributor must supply successful current-head real-environment proof before merge.

target.title: feat: add tool search directory mode
target.body:
## Summary
- Add `tools.toolSearch.mode: "directory"` so large catalogs can expose a compact prompt directory plus `tool_describe`/`tool_call` controls while deferring most schemas.
- Hydrate likely or requested directory tools from the catalog, including missing tool calls, while preserving sequential execution contracts.
- Keep client tools directly visible in directory mode and document the new mode.

Fork attribution: based on JuanHuaXu/openclaw `codex/tool-search-directory-mode`, compared from `codex/fix-post-tool-continuation-guard`.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check`
- Merge-refresh proof at `796472c699`: `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`
- Merge-refresh proof at `796472c699`: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/simple-completion-runtime.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- Merge-refresh proof at `796472c699`: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=gpt-5.5 --thinking codex=high` returned clean: no accepted/actionable findings.
- Hosted Crabbox/Testbox live E2E: `tbx_01ktppx0dxxps5rf2qtzhg4jwy`, Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27223948791

- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`
- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/simple-completion-runtime.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`
- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=gpt-5.5 --thinking codex=high` returned clean: no accepted/actionable findings.

## Real behavior proof
- Behavior addressed: `tools.toolSearch.mode: "directory"` keeps hidden authorized catalog schemas deferred while allowing exact-name hydration through the normal agent validation, hook, result-normalization, replay, capability-guidance, and execution-mode paths. Current head also falls back to direct authorized tools when `tool_search` is denied, rejects ambiguous directory client names, ignores malformed deferred names, and bounds prompt/family expansion.
- Real environment tested: Hosted Blacksmith Testbox live proof remains from feature head `35198cf3` using Testbox `tbx_01ktppx0dxxps5rf2qtzhg4jwy`, Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27223948791, model `openai/gpt-5.5`. Current exact head `e6d565912a26b67edfee69220bf74f421c192a53` was tested locally from the isolated PR worktree after merging current `upstream/main` at `e3a6da0f518136a4277373afdf4b7f894c9e092f`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/system-prompt.test.ts src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts src/agents/agent-tool-definition-adapter.test.ts src/agents/agent-tool-definition-adapter.after-tool-call.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.splitsdktools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/subagent-active-context.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-call-normalization.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/simple-completion-runtime.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`; scoped `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs` over all 22 changed TS/test files; `pnpm build`; `pnpm docs:list`; `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`; `git merge-tree --write-tree upstream/main HEAD`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=kepler-alpha --thinking codex=high`.
- Evidence after fix:

```text
Current head: e6d565912a26b67edfee69220bf74f421c192a53
Merged base: e3a6da0f518136a4277373afdf4b7f894c9e092f
Focused Vitest: 4 shards, 15 files, 527 tests passed
Scoped oxlint: passed
Production build: passed, including plugin SDK DTS/exports and UI build
pnpm docs:list: completed
git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD: passed
git merge-tree --write-tree upstream/main HEAD: passed
Persisted Kepler autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings
overall: patch is correct (0.93)

Hosted live proof retained from feature head:
provider=blacksmith-testbox id=tbx_01ktppx0dxxps5rf2qtzhg4jwy
Actions: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27223948791
Live model: openai/gpt-5.5
Observed: Live plugin tool Docker E2E passed
```

- Observed result after fix: The hosted E2E proved a packed plugin tool can execute through directory mode in a live `openai/gpt-5.5` turn. Exact-head focused proof verifies the later repairs: bounded/searchable directory presentation, exact authorized hydration, preserved replay/capabilities/tool contracts, normal adapter execution, safe malformed-name handling, client-name collision rejection, and current-main conflict integration.
- What was not tested: Exact-head hosted live E2E was not rerun after the current-head repairs and current-main merge; the hosted live behavior proof remains from `35198cf3`. Direct Azure Crabbox was not run because this laptop is not logged into Azure Crabbox. No mobile, Desktop, or Telegram-visible behavior changed.
